_num_samples: Total number of samples to generate for the dataset
_im_size: Resolution of the magnetic field grid (e.g., 12x12)
_nNeutrons: Number of neutrons simulated per projection angle
_nAngles: Number of projection angles around the sample (0 to 360 degrees)
_wavelengths: Range and step size for neutron wavelengths in Angstroms
_scaleD: Geometric scaling factor for source/detector geometry
_minmax_B: Maximum magnitude of the generated magnetic field (Tesla)
_seed: Random seed for reproducible data generation
_out_dir: Output directory for the generated datasets
_batch_size: Data Generation: Number of samples processed in parallel on the GPU
_train_batch_size: Training: Batch size for neural network training
_train_lr: Training: Learning rate for the optimizer
_hidden_dim: Model: Number of features in hidden layers (Increased for GPU)
_pool_res: Model: Spatial pooling resolution (Height, Width). (72, 24) is high-capacity GPU setting.
_train_split: Training: Fraction of data used for training vs validation
